sprint: Sprint 15 -- Data v2 Complete + Clean Slate
backlogItem: B-037 (Pi Sprint phase kickoff) + Spool Data v2 Stories 3+4 + Session 23 clean-slate + TD-015/017/018 bundled cleanup

testBaseline.note: Post-Sprint-14 close baseline: Ralph's US-201 Session 70 handoff reports fast suite 2590 -> 2605 (+15 net, 0 regressions). Ruff on src/ tests/ clean. Sprint 14 merged to main@dc4781b on 2026-04-20.

sprintNotes: GOAL: complete Spool's Data v2 bundle (DTC + drive-metadata), wipe Session 23 first-light rows so drive_id=1 is the first REAL drive, close 3 stale TDs, and load a first-drive-validation contract that activates whenever CIO takes a real drive.

EXECUTION ORDER: US-205 (truncate, clear slate) -> US-204 (DTC, largest single story) -> US-206 (drive-metadata, builds on drive_id) -> US-207 (TD bundled cleanup, parallelizable) -> US-208 (first-drive validation, activity-gated).

THEME: after Sprint 14's data-collection hardening, this sprint COMPLETES the capture surface. After Sprint 15 ships, the next real Eclipse drive will record: canonical UTC-ISO timestamps, drive_id + data_source tagging, 6 new PIDs + ELM_VOLTAGE, DTCs on session start + MIL events, ambient/baro/starting-battery metadata per drive. That's the capture fully equipped.

CONSTRAINTS: Session 23 regression fixture (data/regression/pi-inputs/eclipse_idle.db) is FROZEN -- do NOT touch. All specs/ and tuner/knowledge.md Session 23 text references are PRESERVED. The truncate only removes operational rows in Pi data/obd.db + server obd2db.

GROUNDING SOURCES: Spool's 2026-04-19-from-spool-data-collection-gaps.md (Stories 3+4 spec) + 2026-04-20-from-spool-session23-truncate-request.md (truncate spec) + offices/pm/tech_debt/TD-015-017-018 (bundled cleanup targets). PM Rule 7 -- every threshold, table column, DTC code traces to one of these sources or is flagged for Spool arbitration.
POST-SPRINT-15 UNBLOCKS: Spool DSM DTC cheat sheet (was blocked on DTC capture), first-drive analytics review ritual, drive-scoped Spool AI prompts with ambient/baro context.

stories.title: Session 23 operational truncate + drive_counter reset (clean slate before first real drive)
stories.intent: Per CIO directive 2026-04-20 (via Spool inbox note), delete Session 23's first-light operational rows from Pi data/obd.db and server obd2db MariaDB, reset drive_counter to 0. Session 23 proved the pipeline end-to-end; its rows carry NULL drive_id (pre-US-200) and are permanent noise in drive-keyed analytics. Regression fixture (data/regression/pi-inputs/eclipse_idle.db) + all specs/knowledge text are PRESERVED -- this only clears operational DB rows. After this lands, the next real drive mints drive_id=1.

acceptance: Pre-flight audit: grep rg --files-with-matches 'drive_counter|session23|eclipse_idle' to catch dependencies. Record filesActuallyTouched in completionNotes.

Script scripts/truncate_session23.py runs --dry-run first: prints orphan-scan results for ai_recommendations (server) + calibration_sessions (both sides) + any other drive_id FK tables discovered; prints DELETE counts per table per host; exits 0 without touching any data.

Script --execute mode requires --dry-run first or fails; backs up Pi data/obd.db to data/obd.db.bak-truncate-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS; backs up server MariaDB affected tables via mysqldump to /tmp/obd2-truncate-backup-<ts>.sql; then runs DELETEs inside transactions (one per host).
Pi post-truncate verification: COUNT(*) WHERE data_source='real' returns 0 on realtime_data, connection_log, statistics, alert_log. drive_counter last_drive_id returns 0.

Server post-truncate verification: same COUNT=0 queries on obd2db mirror tables. ai_recommendations + calibration_sessions orphan rows either deleted or explicitly documented as untouched with rationale.
Regression fixture integrity: file size of eclipse_idle.db unchanged; SHA-256 pre-truncate equals SHA-256 post-truncate. Script embeds and asserts this.
specs/architecture.md Section 5 Drive Lifecycle: Invariant #4 rewritten to note Session 23 truncated per CIO 2026-04-20, clean-slate is new baseline.
Inbox confirmation to offices/tuner/inbox/YYYY-MM-DD-from-ralph-us205-truncate-complete.md with final DELETE counts + orphan-scan results + backup paths + fixture hash confirmation.
verification: ssh mcornelison@10.27.27.28 sqlite3 ~/Projects/Eclipse-01/data/obd.db "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM realtime_data WHERE data_source='real'; SELECT last_drive_id FROM drive_counter;"
ssh mcornelison@10.27.27.10 mysql obd2db -e "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM realtime_data WHERE data_source='real'; SELECT last_drive_id FROM drive_counter;"
invariants: Do NOT touch data/regression/pi-inputs/eclipse_idle.db. Hash-verify before and after.
Do NOT UPDATE rows -- DELETE only. No retroactive drive_id backfill.
Do NOT delete rows with data_source != 'real'. WHERE clause strict equality.
Do NOT delete specs/ or knowledge.md text.
Backups MUST land before any DELETE. Script fails open if backup step fails.
Script is idempotent: re-running after successful truncate is a no-op (counts 0).
stopConditions: STOP if orphan scan surfaces ai_recommendations or calibration_sessions rows referencing Session 23 window -- file brief inbox note to PM with row IDs + recommendation (delete alongside, null source, or defer).
STOP if mysqldump backup fails with non-trivial error -- do not proceed to DELETE.
STOP if file-hash check on eclipse_idle.db diverges pre/post -- rollback from backup immediately.
STOP if drive_counter schema on server differs from Pi -- document and pass-through on one side only.

stories.title: Spool Data v2 Story 3 -- DTC retrieval Mode 03/07 + dtc_log table + server mirror
stories.pmSignOff: Marcus 2026-04-20: L-size justified. New capability (not a PID addition): Mode 03/07 client + new dtc_log table on Pi + server mirror + sync path registration + MIL-event rising-edge trigger wiring into orchestrator + full test suite across client/logger/schema/sync/fixture. ~18 files touched. US-204 reservation held since Session 24 with full skeleton in story_counter.json. Acceptance criteria tight: event-driven (not tier-scheduled), per-connection Mode-07-probe cache, drive_id inheritance via US-200 context, data_source DEFAULT via US-195 template, canonical timestamps via US-202. Stop conditions cover multi-frame ISO-TP decode failures, unknown DSM P1XXX codes, migration-pattern divergence, orchestrator event-loop refactor. Signed off for execution.
stories.intent: Add OBD-II diagnostic trouble code (DTC) retrieval to the Pi collector and persist to a new dtc_log table on Pi + server. Runs Mode 03 (stored DTCs) + Mode 07 (pending DTCs) at drive start, then Mode 03 again on MIL illumination mid-drive. Every DTC row keyed to drive_id (from US-200) + data_source (from US-195). Mode 07 probed-first; if 2G ECU doesn't support it, skip silently + document in grounded-knowledge. Unblocks Spool's diagnostic analytics and the DSM DTC cheat sheet.

filesToTouch: src/pi/obdii/dtc_client.py (new -- wraps python-obd GET_DTC Mode 03 + GET_CURRENT_DTC Mode 07 probe-first; returns (code_str, description, status) tuples; handles 2G unsupported path)
src/pi/obdii/dtc_logger.py (new -- DtcLogger with logSessionStartDtcs(driveId) + logMilEventDtcs(driveId); inserts into dtc_log; pulls drive_id from setCurrentDriveId context)

src/pi/data/database_schema.py (new SCHEMA_DTC_LOG: dtc_code TEXT, description TEXT, status CHECK IN ('stored','pending','cleared'), first_seen_timestamp + last_seen_timestamp DEFAULT canonical, drive_id INTEGER NULL FK, data_source DEFAULT 'real'; IX on drive_id + dtc_code)
src/pi/data/database.py (initialize runs ensureDtcLogTable migration + indexes; idempotent)
src/pi/obdii/drive/detector.py (_startDrive hook calls DtcLogger.logSessionStartDtcs; MIL rising-edge from orchestrator dispatches logMilEventDtcs)

src/pi/data/sync_log.py (add dtc_log to DELTA_SYNC_TABLES + PK_COLUMN as id)

src/pi/obdii/engine_state.py + src/pi/obdii/drive_id.py (US-200 -- drive_id minting + context pattern)

drive_counter semantics (US-200 monotonic sequence) -- DTC CONSUMES drive_id

groundingRefs.value: Mode 03 (GET_DTC) + Mode 07 (GET_CURRENT_DTC)
dtc_code TEXT, description TEXT, status IN ('stored','pending','cleared'), first_seen/last_seen_timestamp TEXT, drive_id INTEGER NULL, data_source DEFAULT 'real'
1998 Mitsubishi Eclipse GST 2G DSM pre-OBD2-full-compliance
Mode 07 may not be supported -- probe first, skip silently
P0171 (system lean bank 1), P0420 (cat efficiency) -- synthetic fixture DTCs

acceptance: Pre-flight audit: rg --files-with-matches 'drive_id|data_source|MIL_ON|GET_DTC' to catch integration points with US-199/200/195. Record filesActuallyTouched in completionNotes.

On session start (first connection_log OPEN event after engine crank), DtcLogger.logSessionStartDtcs(driveId) runs Mode 03 + Mode 07 (if supported); each returned code becomes a dtc_log row tagged with driveId + data_source='real'.

On MIL bit rising edge (0->1) from US-199 decoder, DtcLogger.logMilEventDtcs(driveId) runs Mode 03 again; duplicates of already-logged codes in same drive UPDATE last_seen_timestamp, new codes INSERT.

Mode 07 probe: Ralph attempts GET_CURRENT_DTC once per session; on NO DATA / UNSUPPORTED response records 'Mode 07 unsupported on this ECU' to grounded-knowledge.md under 2G DSM + caches on ObdConnection instance (not persisted).
Pi schema: PRAGMA table_info(dtc_log) returns 7-column shape with CHECK on status, drive_id INTEGER NULL, timestamps DEFAULT canonical.
Server schema: DESCRIBE dtc_log returns mirror shape with id BIGINT PK, (source_device, source_id) UNIQUE, drive_id BIGINT NULL, data_source DEFAULT 'real'.
Sync path: Pi inserts 2 synthetic DTCs; sync_now.py pushes; server shows 2 corresponding rows with correct id rename, drive_id preserved, data_source preserved.
Fixture test: test_dtc_fixture.py creates synthetic Pi DB with 1 DTC row (P0171, stored, drive_id=1, data_source='real') + verifies replay + server sync produces correct state.
Integration test: test_dtc_logger.py uses Fake ObdConnection returning canned Mode 03 bytes for P0420 + Mode 07 UNSUPPORTED; asserts P0420 landed in dtc_log and Mode 07 probe recorded as unsupported.
specs/architecture.md Section 11 DTC Lifecycle written with schema table, MIL-event flow, 2G Mode 07 fallback, 5-invariants subsection.
docs/testing.md DTC Retrieval Walkthrough 5-step procedure (seed synthetic, simulate MIL, query Pi, sync, verify server).
Fast suite +N new tests, 0 regressions; ruff clean; sprint_lint 0 errors.
verification: pytest tests/pi/obdii/test_dtc_client.py tests/pi/obdii/test_dtc_logger.py tests/pi/data/test_dtc_log_schema.py tests/server/test_dtc_sync.py tests/pi/regression/test_dtc_fixture.py -v
ruff check src/pi/obdii/dtc_client.py src/pi/obdii/dtc_logger.py src/server/api/sync.py tests/pi/obdii/test_dtc_client.py tests/pi/obdii/test_dtc_logger.py tests/server/test_dtc_sync.py
invariants: DTC retrieval is EVENT-DRIVEN, not tier-scheduled. Do NOT add dtc_log to config.json pollingTiers.
Mode 07 probe result is NOT persisted -- per-connection cache on ObdConnection. Reconnect re-probes.
Every dtc_log row MUST carry drive_id (inherited from setCurrentDriveId context). NULL drive_id is a bug.
data_source on dtc_log follows US-195: DEFAULT 'real', CHECK constraint, NEVER NULL.
Timestamps use US-202 canonical format (DEFAULT strftime ISO-8601Z).
DTC descriptions come from python-obd DTC_MAP; fall through to empty string if unknown. Do NOT invent descriptions -- that's specs/ territory.
Duplicate DTCs within same drive bump last_seen via UPDATE; new drives get new rows even for same code.
stopConditions: STOP if 2G ECU responds to Mode 03 with multi-frame ISO-TP payload that python-obd built-in handlers can't decode -- file inbox note with raw bytes. Do NOT invent custom multi-frame parser.

STOP if Mode 03 returns codes python-obd DTC_MAP doesn't know (e.g., Mitsubishi P1XXX) -- log with empty description; file inbox note to Spool listing unknown codes for DSM cheat sheet. Do NOT invent descriptions.
STOP if dtc_log server-side SQLAlchemy model requires Alembic migration diverging from US-195/US-200 pattern -- brief PM on migration strategy before executing.
STOP if MIL rising-edge detection requires refactoring orchestrator event loop (US-199 decoders produce values, not events) -- propose integration pattern in inbox before implementing.

stories.title: Spool Data v2 Story 4 -- drive-metadata capture (ambient IAT, starting battery, barometric at drive start)
stories.intent: Capture three drive-scoped metadata values at drive-start (US-200 _startDrive hook): ambient_temp_at_start (from IAT PID 0x0F captured BEFORE first cranking event, proxy for ambient), starting_battery_v (from ELM_VOLTAGE at key-on), barometric_kpa (from PID 0x33 pinned at drive-start). Storage: new drive_summary table on Pi + server. One row per drive keyed to drive_id. Unblocks Spool's drive-level context for AI prompts + interpretation anchors.

filesToTouch: src/pi/obdii/drive_summary.py (new -- DriveSummary dataclass + SummaryRecorder.captureDriveStart(driveId, readingSnapshot) -- reads three metadata values from current ObdDataLogger state, INSERTs to drive_summary)

src/pi/data/database_schema.py (SCHEMA_DRIVE_SUMMARY: drive_id INTEGER PK FK to drive_counter, ambient_temp_at_start_c REAL NULL, starting_battery_v REAL NULL, barometric_kpa_at_start REAL NULL, drive_start_timestamp TEXT DEFAULT canonical, data_source TEXT DEFAULT 'real')
src/pi/data/database.py (initialize runs ensureDriveSummaryTable migration; idempotent)

tests/pi/obdii/test_drive_summary.py (captureDriveStart with 3-value snapshot, null-tolerance, cold-start detection)

tests/server/test_drive_summary_sync.py (SNAPSHOT or delta upsert by (source_device, drive_id))

doNotTouch: US-199 decoders (BARO + BATTERY_V + IAT stay as-is; this story CONSUMES)
US-200 engine_state thresholds (250/500 RPM crank/run stay)
Mode 01 PID polling tiers (consumes cached values, no new polls)

groundingRefs.value: ambient_temp captured from IAT PID 0x0F only on UNKNOWN/KEY_OFF -> CRANKING transitions (true cold start); warm restarts record NULL
starting_battery_v from ELM_VOLTAGE at drive-start (key-on, pre-cranking loads)
barometric_kpa from PID 0x33 at drive-start; doesn't change during drive
Chicago ~101.3 kPa baseline; weather 97-103 kPa; altitude negligible for this vehicle

acceptance: Pre-flight audit: rg --files-with-matches '_startDrive|drive_id|getLatestReadings' to find integration sites. Record filesActuallyTouched.
drive_summary table created on Pi with PK drive_id + 4 metadata columns + canonical timestamp default; migration idempotent.
Server drive_summary mirror with matching schema + (source_device, drive_id) UNIQUE; Alembic or raw-SQL migration consistent with US-204 pattern.
SummaryRecorder.captureDriveStart(driveId, snapshot) inserts one row per drive-start; idempotent on re-call with same driveId (UPDATE not INSERT on conflict).

Cold-start-only ambient rule: when _startDrive fires with engine_state.lastTransition.fromState IN ('UNKNOWN','KEY_OFF'), ambient_temp_at_start_c = snapshot['INTAKE_TEMP']; when fromState='RUNNING' (warm restart), ambient_temp_at_start_c = NULL. Tests assert both paths.
Sync: Pi inserts drive_summary row for drive_id=42 with cold-start values; sync_now.py dry-run shows it; real sync pushes; server row appears.
specs/architecture.md Section 5 drive_summary subsection; specs/grounded-knowledge.md ambient IAT caveat.
Fast suite +N new tests, 0 regressions; ruff clean; sprint_lint 0 errors.
verification: ruff check src/pi/obdii/drive_summary.py src/pi/obdii/data/logger.py src/pi/obdii/drive/detector.py src/server/models/__init__.py src/server/api/sync.py
invariants: Do NOT add new Mode 01 PID polls. Consume cached values from ObdDataLogger snapshot only.
Do NOT capture ambient_temp on warm restarts -- the NULL is semantically important (Spool analytics treat NULL as 'ambient unknown').
Do NOT write drive_summary mid-drive. Strictly drive-start metadata.
drive_summary row inherits drive_id from _startDrive -- NEVER creates a new drive_id.
data_source column follows US-195 DEFAULT 'real' pattern.
Timestamps use US-202 canonical format.
stopConditions: STOP if ObdDataLogger doesn't expose a clean read-only snapshot API and adding one requires touching polling loops -- brief PM on the refactor.
STOP if SNAPSHOT-vs-DELTA-sync choice is ambiguous (e.g., future story wants mid-drive updates but US-194 SNAPSHOT means full-table-per-sync) -- file inbox note.
STOP if cold-start ambient rule produces NULL on 100% of test scenarios -- indicates US-200 state-transition detection isn't firing; check state machine before more tests.

stories.title: Close TD-015 + TD-017 + TD-018 + TD-028 bundled cleanup (4-for-1 hygiene)
stories.intent: Close four tech-debt items. TD-015 (HARDWARE_AVAILABLE false-negative in lifecycle.py import path); TD-017 (Windows Store Python full-suite flake bucket -- mark-as-flaky or restructure); TD-018 (ruff drift in scripts/, specs/, offices/, validate_config.py -- 28 pre-existing errors outside src/ tests/ scope); TD-028 (ralph.sh promise-tag contract drift -- 7 tags in script vs 3 documented in prompt.md; add the 4 missing to docs + add a minimal shellcheck guard that the two lists stay in sync). Low-risk housekeeping. If the 4-for-1 bundle exceeds S caps, split TD-028 into Sprint 16 at Ralph's discretion.

stories.title: B-037 Pi Sprint kickoff -- first-drive validation + post-drive analytics smoke test
stories.intent: Activity-gated story that validates the full Sprint-14-plus-15 capture surface during CIO's next real drive. Contract loaded now; executes whenever CIO takes a drive in the sprint window. Verifies: canonical timestamps end-to-end, drive_id minted + inherited by realtime/statistics/alert/dtc/drive_summary, 6 new PIDs + ELM_VOLTAGE populated, DTCs captured if MIL or 'no DTCs' cleanly recorded, drive_summary has ambient/baro/battery if cold-start or NULL ambient if warm-restart. Post-drive: sync_now.py pushes, report.py generates drive-keyed summary, Spool AI prompt templates run against dataset.

filesToTouch: scripts/validate_first_real_drive.sh (new -- CIO-runnable end-to-end validator: SSH gate -> Pi drive-window query -> row-count sanity per table -> drive_id check -> data_source check -> timestamp canonical-format check -> dtc_log check -> drive_summary check -> sync_now.py push -> server mirror query -> report.py generation -> Spool AI prompt invocation; prints pass/fail per step with diagnostic)
docs/testing.md (First Real Drive Validation section: preconditions, 5+ min drive recommended with engine start-stop if possible, post-drive procedure, expected output table)
offices/pm/backlog/B-037.md (Pi Sprint phase kickoff note + first-drive checklist)
tests/pi/integration/test_first_drive_replay.py (off-Pi integration test: uses eclipse_idle.db fixture PLUS synthetic DTC + drive_summary rows to exercise validator's query paths)
specs/architecture.md (minor -- Section 5 references validator as end-to-end verification tool)
filesToRead: scripts/verify_live_idle.sh (US-197 -- SSH gate + service control + window query pattern)
doNotTouch: Pi production collector code (US-208 is read-only verification)
eclipse_idle.db fixture (reuse as test base; do not mutate)

groundingRefs.value: 21+ Mode 01 PIDs + ELM_VOLTAGE + DTC Mode 03/07 + drive_summary + drive_id + data_source + canonical UTC-ISO timestamps
5+ minute drive with at least one engine start-stop-start cycle
drive_id = 1 (post-US-205 truncate + counter reset)
82C (180F) sustained warm-idle coolant threshold for I-016 disposition
groundingRefs.source: I-016 file + Ralph 2026-04-20 Sprint 15 review note

groundingRefs.value: >=15 minutes continuous engine-on idle with no connection churn
groundingRefs.source: Ralph 2026-04-20 review note + I-016 three-hypothesis framing

acceptance: Pre-flight audit: confirm US-204/US-205/US-206 passes:true before starting. If any pending, skip acceptance execution but load contract + draft validator script.
scripts/validate_first_real_drive.sh runs end-to-end without hardcoded row counts (infers from drive window via time bounds + drive_id); pass/fail per step with clear failure message.
Off-Pi test: pytest tests/pi/integration/test_first_drive_replay.py simulates validator against synthetic fixture (eclipse_idle.db + synthetic DTC + synthetic drive_summary); all assertions pass.

Post-real-drive (if CIO drives in window): validator reports all steps pass on actual drive data. drive_id == 1. All Sprint-14-plus-15 tables populated. Server sync successful. report.py generates human-readable summary. Spool AI prompt runs + returns recommendation (may be 'insufficient data' for short drive -- valid).

If CIO does NOT drive in sprint window: acceptance based on (a) off-Pi integration test pass AND (b) validate_first_real_drive.sh --dry-run exits 0 with 'no real drive data in window' clearly reported.

I-016 drill protocol addendum (per Ralph 2026-04-20 review note): the drill includes sustained warm-idle >=15 minutes continuously (no connection churn). Validator queries max coolant_temp from the drive window. If max >= 82C (180F), I-016 closes benign with reference to the drill rows. If coolant stays below 180F the full 15 minutes, I-016 escalates to a hardware-investigation story in Sprint 16+. Either outcome documented in the validator's output + offices/pm/issues/I-016 annotation.
docs/testing.md validation section + expected-output table updated; includes the 15-minute sustained-warmup step + coolant disposition flow.
offices/pm/backlog/B-037.md Pi Sprint phase kickoff note added.
invariants: Activity-gated. If no real drive in sprint window, acceptance reduces to off-Pi integration test + dry-run pass. Do NOT synthesize fake drive data on Pi to force real-path pass.
Validator is READ-ONLY against Pi + server DBs. No UPDATEs, DELETEs, migrations.
Validator output is pass/fail per step with diagnostic -- no silent skips. 'Not applicable' is valid pass state but MUST be reported explicitly.
Do NOT require specific PID counts or absolute row counts -- drive-duration-dependent. Assert shape + presence, not absolute counts.
eclipse_idle.db fixture READ-ONLY for test use.
stopConditions: STOP if US-204/205/206 haven't landed at story start -- file pre-flight note, load contract + draft script, defer acceptance execution.
STOP if validate_first_real_drive.sh query path diverges materially from verify_live_idle.sh pattern -- reuse established shape.
STOP if Spool AI prompt invocation requires modifying prompt templates -- Spool's lane, file inbox note.
STOP if CIO has not reported a drive within 7 days of sprint start -- file defer-to-Sprint-16 note; story passes via off-Pi path only.
